creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 258461
Photograph of a panic, Saturday 2025-03-08 at 02:28

(In reply to Franco Fichtner from comment #11)

> … like some core dumps are truncated …

From comparable bug 285275 comment 1: 

>  Dump Status: good

I begin to doubt that the dump was _entirely_ good. From 
<https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-wireless/2025-March/003034.html>
yesterday:

> … First panic today, Saturday 2025-03-08 02:18, …

> For the first of the panics: I can not offer a backtrace, sorry.
> 
> IIRC the second panic occurred after the savecore for the first; during 
> automated generation of the crash summary.
> 
> …

The attached photograph was taken at 02:28:59 on Saturday. 

Reminding myself that it was taken less than eighty seconds after the automated restart that followed the 02:18 panic: 

grahamperrin:~ % grep BOOT /var/log/messages | grep 8\ 02
Mar  8 02:27:43 mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd kernel: ---<<BOOT>>---
Mar  8 02:34:24 mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd kernel: ---<<BOOT>>---
Mar  8 02:41:45 mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd kernel: ---<<BOOT>>---
grahamperrin:~ % 

𣀓– and the last line in /var/log/messages, before the photograph, was stamped 02:28:17. It probably took around thirty seconds for me to handle the iPad with which I took the the photo.
